response.justification: Strong engineering foundation with 17+ years of experience and current work in AI infrastructure, but lacks the demonstrated AI product/platform expertise explicitly required for this director-level AI strategy role. Missing advanced degree in AI field. Worth exploring depth of AI work at re:cinq before deciding.
strengths: 17+ years of software engineering experience exceeding requirements, with multiple staff-level roles at established companies
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq, showing recent AI exposure
Full-stack technical fluency with cloud expertise (AWS, Kubernetes), multiple languages, and proven leadership through mentoring and public speaking
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms built—current role focuses on AI infrastructure tooling rather than AI applications or strategy
Lacks Master's or PhD in AI-related field; educational background is in general Computer Science and Fine Arts photography
No evidence of 'recognized expertise in AI' through publications, patents, AI-focused conferences, or well-known AI projects in portfolio
